title: centaurea eliasii
intro: Centaurea eliasii, also known as Elias' knapweed, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, white flowers and prickly foliage. The medicinal properties of Centaurea eliasii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin issues, and digestive problems. The health benefits of consuming Centaurea eliasii are said to include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Centaurea eliasii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
